summary: R3 repairs systems_architect REQUEST_CHANGES F1-F3. Browser Pixi now renders route-node anchors from the existing MapAnchorRenderInstruction/read-model surface, exposes data-anchor-count=8 on the real canvas, and keeps anchors visual-only with eventMode none. Evidence screenshots were regenerated at 1440x900 and 1280x720 after route-node rendering; both show irregular topology districts, route-node markers, explicit route 24, legend, current focus/action affordances, and no rectangular/hex/regular lattice board. The geometry perturbation regression now reprojects a perturbed topology DTO through projectM7TopologyClientReadModels with the same accepted path-preview DTOs and asserts unchanged path preview edge sequences/reason codes, drawable route ids, route-source count, and district-endpoint non-drawing.
commit: HEAD 374c2813; working tree contains uncommitted R3 review changes

fixes.result: Fixed in packages/map-renderer/src/index.ts. BrowserPixiMapRenderer now owns an anchorLayer, clears/destroys it with the other Pixi layers, renders every plan.anchors entry through createAnchorMarker, and sets data-anchor-count on the mounted canvas. The marker is non-authoritative: it is drawn from MapAnchorRenderInstruction only, has eventMode none, and is not used to infer routes, hit tests, adjacency, reachability, or command behavior.

Regenerated task evidence screenshots with the browser Pixi route-node markers visible. The 1440x900 and 1280x720 captures show a framed map region with irregular district polygons, visible route-node dots, explicit route 24, current focus/action card, map legend, and no regular grid, hex, or lattice board. Screenshot styling only increases map-row capture height; it does not add or fake topology semantics.

Strengthened in tests/map-renderer-m2-map.test.ts. The test now creates a perturbed topologyResult DTO by changing district polygon points, keeps the same accepted pathPreviewResults DTOs, re-runs projectM7TopologyClientReadModels, and asserts unchanged path preview signatures, drawable route ids [24], topology route-source count 25, exactly one drawable route-source with points, route 1/14 district-endpoint legs remain non-drawing, and geometryPerturbationInvariantPath keeps edge sequence [3,22,19] with topology.path.reachable.

anti_grid_evidence.m2_grid_default_path: M2_PROTOTYPE_GRID_COLUMNS remains off the player-facing default path. The default path is createBootstrappedShellSnapshot -> createM7TopologyClientReadModelSnapshot -> createM7TopologyReadModelFixture/projectM7TopologyClientReadModels using accepted topology/path-preview DTO surfaces.
anti_grid_evidence.route_points_source: Drawable route points come only from explicit topology route-node endpoint anchors exposed through the accepted topology read model. In the current DTO, only route 24 has route-node to route-node endpoints, so only route 24 is drawable. District endpoint edges remain in routeEdges/pathPreviews/reason copy but are not drawn without explicit route-node/polyline points.
anti_grid_evidence.no_fake_route_lines: Renderer and projection do not draw district centroid, district anchor, bounding-box, nearest-neighbor, visual-adjacency, sequential-id, grid, or hidden-lattice route lines. Edges with any district endpoint project to an empty points array for drawing.
anti_grid_evidence.perturbation_invariant: Polygon perturbation does not change path because path preview edgeSequence/reasonCodes are consumed from accepted path-preview DTOs. The R3 regression perturbs topology DTO district polygons before projection and verifies path preview signatures and AI/player reason codes remain unchanged.
anti_grid_evidence.visual_neighbor_without_route: Covered by topology antiGridEvidence for districts 13 -> 14: edge sequence is empty and reasonCodes include topology.path.no-known-route. E2E verifies the player copy: No known topology route / Outer sound has no known explicit route.
anti_grid_evidence.visually_distant_explicit_route: Covered by topology antiGridEvidence for districts 2 -> 9: edge sequence [24] and reasonCodes include topology.path.reachable. E2E and map-renderer tests verify route 24 is the visible/drawable explicit route.
anti_grid_evidence.blocked_capacity_no_known_copy: Map-renderer tests cover capacity-exceeded reason code for 2 -> 9. E2E covers no-known-route and blocked route copy, including blocked edge sequence 25 and the Pass survey blocks this explicit route localized feedback.

evidence_screenshots.result: Shows irregular district polygons, route-node markers, explicit route 24, legend, hover/details strip, selected District 1 action affordance, and no regular board.
Shows enough map area to identify irregular districts, route-node markers, explicit route 24, legend semantics, and selected/current-action affordance; not a bottom sliver.

tests_run.result: Reviewed before and after e2e. Modified/untracked paths are allowed client/test/process/evidence paths. After e2e, old M7-SYSTEMIC-INTERACTION-VALIDATION evidence PNGs were restored to HEAD and no longer appear in git status.

Vitest passed: 1 file, 9 tests. R3 assertions cover anchor render-plan count, visual-neighbor/no-route, visually-distant route 24, capacity, variable degree/dead-end/chokepoint/modes, and reprojected polygon perturbation invariance.
Playwright passed: 30 tests. Regenerated the two M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-CLIENT-001 evidence screenshots and asserted browser canvas data-anchor-count=8, data-route-count=1, and data-route-source-count=25.
format:check, lint, typecheck, and architecture:check passed; architecture self-test produced 15 expected violations.

old_evidence_png_status: project/messages/outbox/M7-SYSTEMIC-INTERACTION-VALIDATION-001__EVIDENCE-1280x720.png and project/messages/outbox/M7-SYSTEMIC-INTERACTION-VALIDATION-001__EVIDENCE-1440x900.png were restored to HEAD after pnpm test:e2e and are not modified in final git status.

scope_compliance.worldstate_mutation: No UI or Pixi WorldState mutation added. React consumes read-model slices; Pixi renders plan instructions; command/preview/submit boundaries remain unchanged.
scope_compliance.full_worldstate_in_redux: No complete WorldState was placed into React/Redux.

remaining_risks: The accepted DTO still only gives route-node drawable geometry for route 24. Richer visible geometry for district-endpoint edges still requires a future explicit route-edge polyline read-model/schema surface; this R3 intentionally does not synthesize those lines in client code.
Route-node markers are low-fidelity visual dots, not final art. They satisfy current topology readability and anti-grid evidence without expanding art-production scope.
requested_action: Review R3 repairs for F1-F3. If accepted, route onward to test_engineer/qa_reviewer per task requirements.
